name: stellar-multisig-safe
description: Multi-signature wallet with time-lock recovery built on Stellar

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:contracts && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run contract:dev" "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.build: npm run contract:build && npm run backend:build && npm run frontend:build
scripts.test: npm run contract:test && npm run backend:test && npm run frontend:test
scripts.lint: npm run contract:lint && npm run backend:lint && npm run frontend:lint
scripts.clean: npm run contract:clean && npm run backend:clean && npm run frontend:clean
scripts.contract:optimize: cd contracts/soroban && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-opt -Oz target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/multisig_safe.wasm -o target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/multisig_safe_opt.wasm
scripts.frontend:clean: cd frontend && rm -rf node_modules dist build
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run stellar:local && npm run contract:build

author: Stellar Multi-Sig Safe Team
